name: Breakfast Casserole
recipeIngredient: 6 Slices White Bread Cut into 1/2 in. Cubes. Cherry Tomatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Coat a skillet with cooking spray and place over medium-high heat until hot.
2. Add pork, Italian seasoning, fennel seeds, and garlic. Cook until meat is browned and crumbled. Drain in a colander, pat dry with paper towels, and set aside.
3. In a large bowl, combine milk, cheddar cheese, chopped green onions, dry mustard, salt, and pepper. Stir well.
4. Add the pork mixture and bread to the bowl, stirring until just blended.
5. Pour into an 11 x 7 x 2 inch baking dish coated with cooking spray.
6. Cover and chill for 8 to 12 hours, or until set and lightly browned.
7. Bake uncovered at 350°F for 50 minutes, or until set and lightly browned. Garnish with tomatoes and green onion tops if desired.
